query:
-- Check existing DataGate billing items
SELECT COUNT(*) as dg_billing_items FROM billing_items WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate';

-- Check customers with Datagate names from the extract
SELECT externalId, name, billingPlatforms FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%Middlemount%' OR name LIKE '%Salter%' OR name LIKE '%Rentokil%' OR name LIKE '%Solahart%'
LIMIT 20;

-- Check billing_items table for existing Xero/SasBoss items for these customers
SELECT bi.contactName, bi.billingPlatform, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName IN ('Middlemount Coal Pty Ltd', 'Salter Brothers', 'Rentokil Initial')
GROUP BY bi.contactName, bi.billingPlatform;

SELECT COUNT(*) as dg_billing_items FROM billing_items WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate';

-- Check customers with Datagate names from the extract
SELECT externalId, name, billingPlatforms FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%Middlemount%' OR name LIKE '%Salter%' OR name LIKE '%Rentokil%' OR name LIKE '%Solahart%'
LIMIT 20;

-- Check billing_items table for existing Xero/SasBoss items for these customers
SELECT bi.contactName, bi.billingPlatform, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName IN ('Middlemount Coal Pty Ltd', 'Salter Brothers', 'Rentokil Initial')
GROUP BY bi.contactName, bi.billingPlatform;
